def positive_celery_result_get_inside_task():
    rule_id = "celery_result_get_inside_task"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Celery tasks synchronously wait on AsyncResult.get(...) instead of handing work off asynchronously."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
